text: What emotion am I feeling right now, and where do I feel it in my body?
What drained my energy today — and what gave me energy?
How did this interaction make me feel, and what does that tell me about what I need?
What am I assuming that might not actually be true?
What is one small thing that went well today?
What would I do differently if I could redo today?
What is one thing I can be proud of today, even if it feels small?
What fear is quietly holding me back right now?
